title: StashCache
description: A mod for remembering where you put your items
body:
StashCache remembers items you have seen in storage containers and lets you search for them later with an in-game overlay.

Reqiuirements: [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/) and [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).

After installing, look into some chests. then:

Press `K`, type an item name/id/enchant/lore and StashCache shows where it has seen matching items. Select a result to add a client-side only waypoint so you can find it.

Works in Singleplayer and Muliplayer.

It should support:
- Chests, trapped chests, including double chests
- Barrels
- Shulker boxes
- Ender chests
- Hoppers
- Droppers
- Dispensers

StashCache only knows about containers you have opened while the mod is installed. The cache can get stale if the containers get modified after you look inside them.

This mod does not achieve more than what you could do with a simple pen and paper, but some servers might still consider it a cheat, so be careful. Ye be warned.

**For any requests, troubleshooting, bug reports or suggestions**, please do tag me on [my Discord server](https://discord.com/invite/8T6G8HgM8u).
